title: Files should not have too many lines of code
description: Large files are often more difficult to understand and maintain.
message: File has too many lines of code.
recommendation: Consider breaking large files into smaller functions or modules.
why_is_this_an_issue: Large files are often more difficult to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Consider breaking large files into smaller functions or modules.

metadata.title: Files should not have too many lines of code
